question_frequency.rationale: The Pair asked zero didactic questions. It went straight to writing code, testing, and explaining the final solution. The CLAUDE.md mandates a two-option choice format which was completely ignored.

question_quality.rationale: No choices were ever surfaced to the user. The camelCase gotcha — the obvious teachable moment — was discovered and fixed unilaterally by the Pair without inviting the user to reason about it.

scaffolding.rationale: There is no scaffolding because there are no questions. The user was a passive observer who only saw a finished solution and a post-hoc explanation.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is clear and the final explanation table is tidy, but the 'flow' is monologue, not dialogue. The user's only turn was a congratulatory wrap-up; there was no back-and-forth.

effectiveness.rationale: Baseline run — productivity criteria pinned to 3 by convention (the baseline IS the reference; judging it comparatively is meaningless).

friction.rationale: Baseline run — productivity criteria pinned to 3 by convention (the baseline IS the reference; judging it comparatively is meaningless).
